command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== PUSH TO GITEA ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "cd /home/jose/moreno-ai && git push origin main 2>&1 | tail -5" 2>&1

echo '=== VALIDATION: run new delegation job ==='
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "import json,base64; print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps({
    'action':'submit_delegation',
    'instruction':'Generate a one-sentence status report: the Moreno AI governed delegation pipeline is operational.',
    'priority':'low',
    'origin':'pipeline-validation-test',
    'requested_by':'jose',
    'rollback_required':False,
    'governed_execution':True
}).encode()).decode())")

ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo DONE_1933
